incidenthub.name: IncidentHub walkthrough
incidenthub.desc: Services for the IncidentHub master learning walkthrough (CKAD/CKA/CKS topics)

components.name: MetalLB
components.desc: Layer 2 load balancer — assigns real routable IPs (172.16.3.0/24) to LoadBalancer services via MetalLB. Requires minikube tunnel to route those IPs from the host into the cluster.

components.name: cert-manager + Vault PKI
components.desc: TLS certificate lifecycle management — issues, renews and revokes HTTPS certs for all lab services via Vault PKI (root CA + intermediate CA, CRL/OCSP)

components.name: HashiCorp Vault
components.desc: Simulates Azure Key Vault — KV v2 secrets, Kubernetes auth backend, PKI root and intermediate CA

components.name: Monitoring (Prometheus + Grafana)
components.desc: Prometheus + Grafana — metrics, dashboards, alerting

components.name: ArgoCD
components.desc: GitOps CD platform — visual deployments from Git

components.name: Kubernetes Dashboard
components.desc: Official Kubernetes web UI — cluster explorer, workloads, logs

components.name: KEDA
components.desc: Kubernetes Event-driven Autoscaling — scale workloads to zero based on external triggers (queues, topics, metrics)

components.name: Reflector
components.desc: Mirrors Secrets and ConfigMaps across namespaces — annotation-driven, keeps mirrors in sync on rotation

components.name: Kyverno
components.desc: Kubernetes-native policy engine — validate / mutate / generate / verifyImages, with audit-mode sample policies

components.name: Falco (runtime security)
components.desc: eBPF-based runtime threat detection — shell-in-container, sensitive-file access, unexpected network flows. UI at falco.aks-lab.local

components.name: Istio (service mesh)
components.desc: Service mesh — mTLS by default, traffic shifting, L7 authorization. ClusterIP gateway (does not replace NGINX)

components.name: Cilium + Hubble
components.desc: eBPF CNI + flow observability — runs alongside default CNI unless LAB_CNI=cilium ./aks-lab setup. UI at hubble.aks-lab.local

components.name: Rancher
components.desc: Rancher multi-cluster management platform — cluster UI, app catalog, RBAC

components.name: Toolbox SSH Pod
components.desc: In-cluster Ubuntu pod — SSH access for debugging

components.name: Exam Simulator Terminal
components.desc: Ubuntu 22.04 SSH pod matching the official CKA/CKAD/CKS PSI exam terminal — 5 kubeconfig contexts, exam aliases, etcdctl, crictl, trivy

components.name: SambaAD (Active Directory DC)
components.desc: Samba 4 Active Directory — LDAP :389, Kerberos :88, corp.internal DNS

components.name: Dex (OIDC Provider)
components.desc: OIDC identity provider — static login without SambaAD, full AD when samba-ad is enabled

components.name: OAuth2 Proxy
components.desc: SSO authentication gateway — protects all web services via ingress

components.name: Corp Client VM
components.desc: Domain-joined Ubuntu VM with XFCE desktop (VNC :5901)

components.name: Azurite (Azure Storage)
components.desc: Azure Blob/Queue/Table Storage emulator

components.name: Azure SQL
components.desc: Azure SQL / SQL Server emulator — localhost:1433

components.name: Cosmos DB
components.desc: Azure Cosmos DB NoSQL emulator (classic) — API + Data Explorer on https://localhost:8081/_explorer/

components.name: Service Bus
components.desc: Azure Service Bus emulator — AMQP :5672, Management :5300 (requires azure-sql backend)

components.name: Container Registry
components.desc: Local Docker registry — localhost:5000

components.name: TaskFlow
components.desc: Three-tier demo app — Nginx → Node.js → PostgreSQL

components.name: Blob Explorer
components.desc: ASP.NET Core Azure Blob Storage browser

components.name: KEDA Service Bus Demo
components.desc: Event-driven message processor — scales 0→5 pods based on Service Bus queue.1 depth

components.name: Argo Workflows
components.desc: Kubernetes-native workflow engine — run steps as pods, DAG pipelines, reusable WorkflowTemplates, UI at localhost:2746

components.name: Azure DevOps Agent
components.desc: Self-hosted Azure Pipelines agent — runs YAML pipeline jobs in the cluster

components.name: Renovate
components.desc: Self-hosted dependency bot — CronJob that scans this repo and opens PRs to bump Flux charts, Dockerfile base images, and GitHub Actions
